forzaHorizon6ReleaseDate.title: Forza Horizon 6 Release Date, Steam Unlock, and Early Access
forzaHorizon6ReleaseDate.intro: Track the key launch dates for Forza Horizon 6 across Xbox, PC, Steam, Game Pass, and PlayStation 5. This guide highlights when the game comes out, when Early Access starts, and which platform gets access first.

items.label: Official Launch Date
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 launches on Xbox Series X|S and PC through the Microsoft Store, Xbox app, and Steam. Standard and Deluxe Edition players enter during the full launch window.

items.label: Steam Store Date
items.description: The Steam storefront displays May 18, 2026 for the Steam release and provides the live store countdown, purchase buttons, and edition options.

items.label: Premium Early Access
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition players and Premium Upgrade owners can start up to four days before the full launch.

items.label: Game Pass Launch
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on launch day.

items.label: PlayStation 5 Release
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 arrives on PlayStation 5 later in 2026, with wishlist access available through the PlayStation Store.

summary: Forza Horizon 6 launches first on Xbox Series X|S and PC.
Forza Horizon 6 Premium Early Access starts four days before the full launch.
Forza Horizon 6 Steam timing can display one day earlier because storefront timing is region-based.

forzaHorizon6SteamPreOrder.title: How to Pre-Order Forza Horizon 6 on Steam
forzaHorizon6SteamPreOrder.intro: Use this Forza Horizon 6 Steam guide to choose an edition, understand Advanced Access, collect the pre-order bonus, and review PC store requirements before launch.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Store Page
steps.description: Open the Forza Horizon 6 Steam app page and use the wishlist, follow, or pre-purchase options. Steam lists Xbox Game Studios as publisher and Playground Games as developer.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Edition Choice
steps.description: Choose Standard Edition at $69.99, Deluxe Edition at $99.99, or Premium Edition at $119.99 depending on launch access and included content.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Advanced Access Check
steps.description: Steam labels Advanced Access for the Premium Edition, while the Forza launch guide describes Premium Early Access as up to four days before the May 19 launch.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Pre-Order Bonus
steps.description: Players who purchase a full edition or the Premium Upgrade before launch receive the exclusive pre-tuned Ferrari J50, redeemable from the in-game Autoshow when Forza Horizon 6 releases.

steps.title: Forza Horizon 6 Steam Feature Review
steps.description: Review Steam features such as single-player, online PvP, online co-op, Family Sharing, Windows 10 22H2, DirectX 12, 16 GB RAM, broadband internet, and SSD storage.

forzaHorizon6EditionsAndPrice.title: Forza Horizon 6 Editions, Prices, and Included Content
forzaHorizon6EditionsAndPrice.intro: Compare Forza Horizon 6 Standard, Deluxe, Premium Edition, and Premium Upgrade before buying. The main decision is whether you want only the full game, extra cars, or the full Premium package with Early Access and expansions.

includes: Pre-order Ferrari J50 bonus when purchased before launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want the base game or plan to play through Game Pass.

includes: Car Pass with 30 cars delivered weekly
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want extra car content without Premium Early Access.

includes: Up to four days Premium Early Access
Italian Passion Car Pack after launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 players who want the earliest access and the broadest content bundle.

includes: Up to four days Premium Early Access
Italian Passion Car Pack after launch
items.bestFor: Forza Horizon 6 Game Pass members or Standard and Deluxe owners who want Premium benefits without buying another full edition.

forzaHorizon6GamePass.title: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Game Pass?
forzaHorizon6GamePass.intro: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on May 19, 2026. Game Pass players can also buy the Premium Upgrade for Early Access and Premium add-ons.

items.label: Game Pass Availability
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition joins Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass at launch on May 19, 2026.

items.label: Console Access
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 console access is listed for Xbox Series X|S through Game Pass Ultimate, with Xbox Cloud Gaming included as part of the membership path.

items.label: PC Access
items.value: PC Game Pass or Game Pass Ultimate
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 PC players can access the game through the Xbox app and Microsoft Store with an eligible subscription.

items.label: Premium Upgrade
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Game Pass players can purchase the Premium Upgrade to play up to four days early and receive Premium Edition add-ons.

items.label: Xbox Play Anywhere
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 Microsoft Store and Xbox purchases support Xbox Play Anywhere across eligible Xbox console and PC devices.

items.label: Steam Version
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 on Steam is sold as a separate storefront purchase with Standard, Deluxe, and Premium pre-purchase options.

forzaHorizon6Ps5Release.title: Forza Horizon 6 PS5 Release
forzaHorizon6Ps5Release.intro: Forza Horizon 6 is coming to PlayStation 5 later in 2026 after the Xbox Series X|S and PC launch. This platform guide covers PS5 wishlist access, launch timing, ownership, DLC purchases, and cross-save support.

items.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 coming to PS5?
items.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 has a PlayStation Store page from Microsoft Corporation, and PlayStation 5 players can add the game to their wishlist.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 platform: PlayStation 5
Forza Horizon 6 publisher: Microsoft Corporation
Forza Horizon 6 PS Store status: Announced

items.question: When is the Forza Horizon 6 PS5 version launching?
items.answer: The Forza Horizon 6 PS5 version is planned for later in 2026. Xbox Series X|S and PC launch first on May 19, 2026, with Premium Edition early access beginning May 15.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 Xbox and PC launch: May 19, 2026
Forza Horizon 6 Premium early access: May 15, 2026
Forza Horizon 6 PS5 release window: Later in 2026

items.question: Can PS5 players wishlist or pre-order Forza Horizon 6?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 PS5 players can add the game to their wishlist on the PlayStation Store. Steam, Xbox, and Microsoft Store PC versions are available for pre-order.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 PS5: Wishlist available
Forza Horizon 6 Steam: Pre-purchase available
Forza Horizon 6 Xbox and Microsoft Store PC: Pre-order available

items.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 PS5 included with another platform purchase?
items.answer: No. Forza Horizon 6 on PS5 is a standalone product. Steam is also treated as a standalone product, while Xbox Play Anywhere covers digital Xbox console and Microsoft Store PC versions.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 PS5 ownership is separate
Forza Horizon 6 Steam ownership is separate
Forza Horizon 6 Xbox Play Anywhere covers Xbox console and Microsoft Store PC

items.question: Will Forza Horizon 6 support cross-play and cross-save on PS5?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 supports cross-play and cross-save between PC and console versions, including Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, SteamOS devices, PC handhelds, and the PS5 version when it arrives.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 cross-play: PC and console
Forza Horizon 6 cross-save: Xbox, PC, Steam, SteamOS, PC handhelds, and PS5
Forza Horizon 6 handheld progress support: Steam Deck and Xbox ROG Ally

items.question: Do Forza Horizon 6 DLC purchases carry over to PS5?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 downloadable content such as Car Packs and Expansions must be purchased on each platform where you want to access that content. Xbox Play Anywhere-supported devices are the exception for Xbox console and Microsoft Store PC access.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 DLC is platform-specific
Forza Horizon 6 PS5 DLC purchases are separate
Forza Horizon 6 Xbox Play Anywhere covers supported Xbox and Microsoft Store PC devices

forzaHorizon6SystemRequirements.title: Forza Horizon 6 System Requirements
forzaHorizon6SystemRequirements.intro: Check Forza Horizon 6 minimum and recommended PC specs for Steam, including Windows version, CPU, GPU, memory, DirectX 12, broadband internet, SSD storage, handheld support, and graphics features.

items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
Forza Horizon 6 recommended specs target a newer mid-range CPU class for smoother open-world racing performance.
Forza Horizon 6 lists 16 GB RAM for both minimum and recommended PC configurations.

items.minimum: Nvidia GTX 1650, AMD RX 6500 XT, or Intel Arc A380
items.recommended: NVIDIA RTX 3060 Ti, AMD RX 6700 XT, or Intel Arc A580
items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 compatible graphics cards can use enhanced ray tracing features.
Forza Horizon 6 requires DirectX 12 on PC.
Forza Horizon 6 online features, multiplayer, and connected services require internet access.
Forza Horizon 6 Steam requirements list SSD storage as required.

items.minimum: 4K HDR, enhanced ray tracing features, high uncapped framerates, and ultrawide monitor support
items.recommended: Use compatible hardware for ray-traced reflections, RTGI, high framerates, and advanced graphics settings
items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 PC graphics settings can be changed without restarting the game, with live previews for many settings.

items.minimum: NVIDIA DLSS, AMD FSR, and Intel XeSS support on compatible hardware
items.recommended: NVIDIA DLSS 4, AMD FSR 4 or 3, and Intel XeSS 2.1
items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 supports advanced upscaling and frame generation options on compatible graphics hardware.

items.minimum: PC handheld support, including Steam Deck and Xbox ROG Ally
items.recommended: Use cross-save to continue progress across supported PC, console, SteamOS, and handheld devices
items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 supports cross-save across every platform where the game can be played.

items.recommended: Use benchmark mode to test performance after changing graphics settings
items.notes: Forza Horizon 6 includes a PC benchmark mode for consistent performance testing.

forzaHorizon6JapanMap.title: Forza Horizon 6 Japan Map
forzaHorizon6JapanMap.intro: The Forza Horizon 6 Japan map is built around the contrast of urban and rural Japan, modern and traditional scenery, diverse biomes, seasonal changes, mountain roads, and world-famous route inspirations.

items.question: What is the Forza Horizon 6 map location?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 takes place in Japan, bringing together scenic rural landscapes, dense urban driving, mountain roads, diverse biomes, and open-world racing routes.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 main setting: Japan
Forza Horizon 6 world style: Horizon-style interpretation of Japan
Forza Horizon 6 core contrast: Rural and urban, modern and traditional

items.question: How big is the Forza Horizon 6 map?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 features the largest map in a Horizon game yet, with strong emphasis on verticality, density, diverse biomes, and seasonal driving experiences.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 largest Horizon map yet
Forza Horizon 6 most dense Horizon map yet
Forza Horizon 6 built for verticality and varied driving

items.question: What areas are shown in the Forza Horizon 6 full map reveal?
items.answer: The Forza Horizon 6 full map reveal presents Horizon Japan from the downtown streets of Tokyo City to the snowy Japanese Alps, giving players a broad mix of city roads, mountains, and scenic exploration routes.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 Tokyo City
Forza Horizon 6 snowy Japanese Alps
Forza Horizon 6 mountain areas
Forza Horizon 6 rural and natural landscapes

items.question: Which real-world routes inspired the Forza Horizon 6 Japan map?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 includes roads inspired by the C1 loop and Gingko Avenue, as well as mountain passes inspired by Mt. Haruna and Bandai Azuma.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 C1 loop-inspired roads
Forza Horizon 6 Gingko Avenue-inspired roads
Forza Horizon 6 Mt. Haruna-inspired mountain passes
Forza Horizon 6 Bandai Azuma-inspired mountain passes

items.question: Does the Forza Horizon 6 Japan map include seasons and biomes?
items.answer: Yes. The Forza Horizon 6 Japan map includes diverse biomes and seasonality, combining urban roads, rural landscapes, mountain scenery, and natural environments across a varied open world.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 dynamic seasonal feel
Forza Horizon 6 urban and rural biomes
Forza Horizon 6 mountain and natural regions
Forza Horizon 6 dense city exploration

items.question: How does the Forza Horizon 6 map connect to progression?
items.answer: Forza Horizon 6 players start as tourists, qualify through the Horizon Invitational, rise through faster car classes, earn Wristbands, complete the Collection Journal, and work toward Horizon Legend status.
highlights: Forza Horizon 6 tourist starting point
Forza Horizon 6 Horizon Invitational
Forza Horizon 6 Wristband progression
Forza Horizon 6 Collection Journal
Forza Horizon 6 Legend Island access

forzaHorizon6TokyoCity.title: Forza Horizon 6 Tokyo City
forzaHorizon6TokyoCity.intro: Tokyo City is one of the biggest reasons players are searching for Forza Horizon 6. This city guide highlights scale, road density, districts, shortcuts, vertical driving, car culture, and open-world multiplayer activities.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Largest Urban Area
items.description: Tokyo City is the largest urban environment ever featured in a Forza Horizon game and is five times larger than Forza Horizon 5's Guanajuato.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Iconic Downtown Streets
items.description: Tokyo City includes iconic downtown streets designed around neon lights, busy roads, layered scenery, and fast exploration with friends.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Suburbs and Shortcuts
items.description: Tokyo City includes suburban roads, corners, and shortcuts built to make every route feel fun to drive and easy to explore.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Docks and Industrial Districts
items.description: Tokyo City lets players challenge themselves in docks and industrial zones, adding a different road feel from downtown and suburban areas.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Dense and Vertical Road Design
items.description: Forza Horizon 6 emphasizes density and verticality, making Tokyo City one of the most detailed and layered environments in the game.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Car Enthusiast Hub
items.description: Tokyo City is positioned as a major car culture hub, with Car Meets, Drag Meets, Time Attack Circuits, and open-world social driving activities.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 JDM and Street Driving Focus
items.description: The Tokyo setting supports Forza Horizon 6 Japanese car culture, including JDM classics, Touge Battles, rare Aftermarket Cars, and authentic car stories.

items.title: Forza Horizon 6 Co-op City Exploration
items.description: Tokyo City can be explored solo or with friends, with multiplayer activities designed to happen naturally in the open world.

faq.title: Forza Horizon 6 FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick Forza Horizon 6 answers for launch date, Steam, Game Pass, Premium Early Access, and platform availability.

questions.question: When is the Forza Horizon 6 release date?
questions.answer: Forza Horizon 6 launches on Xbox Series X|S and PC on May 19, 2026, with the Steam store displaying May 18, 2026 for its storefront timing.

questions.question: Does Forza Horizon 6 have Premium Early Access?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition and Premium Upgrade owners can start up to four days early beginning May 15, 2026.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Steam?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 is available for Steam pre-purchase with Standard, Deluxe, and Premium Edition options.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Game Pass?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 Standard Edition is included with Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass on launch day.

questions.question: How much does Forza Horizon 6 cost on Steam?
questions.answer: Forza Horizon 6 Steam pricing lists Standard Edition at $69.99, Deluxe Edition at $99.99, and Premium Edition at $119.99.

questions.question: Is Forza Horizon 6 coming to PlayStation 5?
questions.answer: Yes. Forza Horizon 6 arrives on PlayStation 5 later in 2026 after the Xbox Series X|S and PC launch.
